Requirements

F.6 or High Diploma of Computer Science above
3-years or above IT helpdesk support or relevant experience
Familiar with Microsoft Windows, MS Office O365, LAN, TCP/IP, and network equipment operation and maintenance.
ITIL V3 or above Certificate is preferred
Ownership of issues and prompt escalations
A team player, self-motivated and inte1-year on technology.
Good command in English and Cantonese
Strong interpersonal and communication skills
Immediate availability is advantageous
Willing to travel out of town for projects

replies.msg:
ownership of issues應該指你嘅問題用你自己方法解決，唔好麻煩/攪到你啲老細或者個客
prompt escalations係話你發現到鑊氣野早啲嚮，等你老細準備/隨時同你割蓆
